cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out if Jerry tells the truth based on the statements given. Let me start by listing out all the people and what they say. Sherrie tells the truth. So Sherrie is always truthful. Ryan says that Sherrie lies. Wait, but Sherrie tells the truth, so Ryan is saying something false here. That means Ryan must be lying, right? Because Sherrie doesn't lie. So if Ryan claims she lies, but she doesn't, then Ryan is a liar. Then Bernita says Ryan tells the truth.
